sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The game is over. I pressed SPACE too many times and caused a game over. The game over happened because I depleted the yellow face completely. Let me look at the current state to understand what happened.
Looking at the current image, the right edge bar is now yellow again, and the black face is back to black. It seems like the game reset or something. Let me check the segmentation.

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    print(n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'])
</parameter>
</function>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The game reset to the initial state! The segmentation is back to the original:
- ID=0: b 1845 - blue background
- ID=1: S 189 - sky blue divider
- ID=2: b 1800 - blue background
- ID=3: Y 64 - yellow bar on right edge
- ID=4: B 40 - black face
- ID=5: c 45 - charcoal shape
- ID=6-10: W 1 - white dots
- ID=11: Y 45 - yellow shape
- ID=12: B 63 - bottom bar
So the game reset to the initial state. I need to figure out what the goal is. Looking at the initial state:
- Left side: black face (40 pixels) with white dots (5 white dots
- Right side: charcoal shape (45 pixels) and yellow shape (45 pixels)
- Right edge: yellow bar (64 pixels)
- Bottom: black bar (63 pixels)
The goal might be to match the black face (40 pixels) with the charcoal shape (45 pixels) or the charcoal shape (45 pixels) with the yellow shape (45 pixels)? Or maybe the goal is to make the black face (40 pixels) with the charcoal shape (45 pixels). So I need to add 5 pixels to the black face.
Or maybe the goal is to make the yellow bar on the right edge (64 pixels) with the bottom bar (63 pixels). So I need to remove 1 pixel from the yellow bar.
Or maybe the goal is to make the yellow shape (45 pixels) with the charcoal shape (45 pixels). They're already the same size.
Or maybe the goal is to make the black face (40 pixels) with the charcoal shape (45 pixels). So I need to add 5 pixels to the black face.
Wait, let me think about this differently. The black face is 40 pixels, the charcoal shape is 45 pixels. The yellow bar on the right edge is 64 pixels. The yellow shape is 45 pixels. The bottom bar is 63 pixels.
Maybe the goal might be to make all the shapes match in the black face (40 pixels) with the charcoal shape (45 pixels). So I need to add 5 pixels to the black face.
Let me think about what SPACE transfers pixels from the yellow bar on the right edge to the black face. Each SPACE transfers 1 pixel.
So the goal might be to make the black face (40 pixels) with the charcoal shape (45 pixels). So I need to add 5 pixels to the black face. So I need to press SPACE 5 times to add 5 pixels to the black face.
Let me try pressing SPACE 5 times.
